name: Christmas Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1 large can pineapple chunks in juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak breadcrumbs in milk.
2. Pour through a sieve and slightly press out excess liquid.
3. Mix all ingredients thoroughly. The mixture should be a little moist.
4. Form small meatballs.
5. Fry in a little shortening until cooked through.
6. Place in sauce and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, covered.
7. Serve from a chafing dish using toothpicks.
8. Serves 15 to 20.
To make sauce:
Combine all ingredients and mix well.
